communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All documents pertaining to collaboration between the US Army and the production of the 2017 film "Yellow Birds," directed by Alexandre Moors. Such documents may include but should not be limited to: script notes; production assistance agreements; and all records of communications between employees of the Army and members of the cast, crew, and production company of "Yellow Birds," including memos, notes of meetings and conference calls, emails, and other forms of communication.

I am the Director of Research Operations at a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization called The Decoding Culture Foundation as well as the editor-in-chief and a contributor to a research magazine published by said foundation titled "Cultural Engineering Studies." These documents will be used for public education and research purposes. I therefore request a waiver of all fees that may otherwise apply. Attached is a document with organization letterhead confirming my position, as well as the organization's 501(c)(3) application and approval form.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Brett Carollo

title: Data Request – Public Personnel Data Under Minn. Stat. §13.43

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Under the Minnesota Government Data Practices Act, I am requesting all public personnel data under Minn. Stat. §13.43 related to Administrative Law Judge Eric Lipman.

Specifically, I request:
• Employment dates
• Salary history
• Current classification/title
• Any final disciplinary action, including the specific reasons for such action and the data documenting the basis of the action
• Any settlement agreements resolving disciplinary matters after final disposition
• Any separation agreements
• The total number of complaints received regarding Administrative Law Judge Lipman from 2020–2025, and the disposition of those complaints (dismissed, investigated, discipline imposed, etc.), excluding private identifying data. If no public disciplinary data exists, please confirm that in writing.


Please provide records in electronic format.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Y.  Edda Sanchez

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All documents pertaining to FBI support for or collaboration with the production of the 2026- TV series "Scarpetta," starring Nicole Kidman. Such documents may include, but are not limited to, script notes; production assistance agreements; and all records of communications between employees of the FBI and members of the cast, crew, and production company of "Scarpetta," including memos, notes of meetings and conference calls, emails, and other forms of communication. I request a search of all locations where such documents might be located, including but not limited to the entertainment liaison offices and communications HQ or similar offices.

I am the Director of Research Operations at a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization called The Decoding Culture Foundation. These documents will be used for public education and research purposes. I therefore request a waiver of all fees that may otherwise apply. Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Brett Carollo

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

A copy of the U.S. Coast Guard personnel records (OMPF) for a former servicemember named ROBERT LASARDO (DATE OF BIRTH: 09/20/1963). Mr. LaSardo was born in Brooklyn. NY. He served in the U.S. Navy for four years during the 1980s, likely during the first half of the decade. Reportedly, he spent the first two years handling attack dogs in the Aleutian Islands, at one point stationed on Adak Island. 

The public interest in Mr. LaSardo, a well known character actor in Hollywood since the late 1980s, should favor disclosure of many of these records, particularly in relation to any disciplinary records, should those records exist.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Brett Carollo
